Locality Guide
for Kelambakkam, Chennai

Kelambakkam is a fast developing residential locality coming up in the southern suburbs of Channai and lies along the coast. The old Mahabalipuram road passes thorugh the locality and the arterial Kelambakkam Vandalur road also begins from Kelambakkam. The east coast road also passes by along the Kovalam stretch and there are many beaches and tourist resorts in this area. Good residential areas neighbouring Keleambakkam include Padur, Pudapakkam, Kazhipattur, Siruseri, Egattur and Navalur. There are also IT hubs and tech parks in the vicinity. This factor alone drives the need for housing in the area. There is a mix of all types of property available in Kelambakkam and these include residential plots, villas, individual homes and apartments. 46% of all the property available for sale or rent in Kelambakkam are apartments and they are 1,2 and 4 BHK apartments. The intenrational airport and the Chennai Central railway station are both 35 to 36 kms away from Kelambakkam. There are 14 new residential projects coming uo in Kelambakkam and 4 of them are still under construction. The quality of ocnstruction is very good and this has served to increase both the viability of the area as well as to improve the overall infeastructure in the area around Kelambakkam. There are schools, hospitals, markets and malls in the area which serve the requirement of the residents.

Locality Guide
for Kelambakkam, Chennai
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
30 More
Kelambakkam is a fast developing residential locality coming up in the southern suburbs of Channai and lies along the coast. The old Mahabalipuram road passes thorugh the locality and the arterial Kelambakkam Vandalur road also begins from Kelambakkam. The east coast road also passes by along the Kovalam stretch and there are many beaches and tourist resorts in this area. Good residential areas neighbouring Keleambakkam include Padur, Pudapakkam, Kazhipattur, Siruseri, Egattur and Navalur. There are also IT hubs and tech parks in the vicinity. This factor alone drives the need for housing in the area. There is a mix of all types of property available in Kelambakkam and these include residential plots, villas, individual homes and apartments. 46% of all the property available for sale or rent in Kelambakkam are apartments and they are 1,2 and 4 BHK apartments. The intenrational airport and the Chennai Central railway station are both 35 to 36 kms away from Kelambakkam. There are 14 new residential projects coming uo in Kelambakkam and 4 of them are still under construction. The quality of ocnstruction is very good and this has served to increase both the viability of the area as well as to improve the overall infeastructure in the area around Kelambakkam. There are schools, hospitals, markets and malls in the area which serve the requirement of the residents.

Locality Guide
for Kelambakkam, Chennai
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
30 More
Kelambakkam is a fast developing residential locality coming up in the southern suburbs of Channai and lies along the coast. The old Mahabalipuram road passes thorugh the locality and the arterial Kelambakkam Vandalur road also begins from Kelambakkam. The east coast road also passes by along the Kovalam stretch and there are many beaches and tourist resorts in this area. Good residential areas neighbouring Keleambakkam include Padur, Pudapakkam, Kazhipattur, Siruseri, Egattur and Navalur. There are also IT hubs and tech parks in the vicinity. This factor alone drives the need for housing in the area. There is a mix of all types of property available in Kelambakkam and these include residential plots, villas, individual homes and apartments. 46% of all the property available for sale or rent in Kelambakkam are apartments and they are 1,2 and 4 BHK apartments. The intenrational airport and the Chennai Central railway station are both 35 to 36 kms away from Kelambakkam. There are 14 new residential projects coming uo in Kelambakkam and 4 of them are still under construction. The quality of ocnstruction is very good and this has served to increase both the viability of the area as well as to improve the overall infeastructure in the area around Kelambakkam. There are schools, hospitals, markets and malls in the area which serve the requirement of the residents.

Locality Guide
for Vanagaram , Chennai
Share
Vanagaram is a residential locality in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It is a part of the Chennai Central Constituency in the Lok Sabha and is a well known and affluent area with several residential projects. It has also turned into a major commercial cum educational zone as well in recent times. The name of the area derives from Vaan which translates into sky and also Agaram which translates to the place of God for prayer or worship or the place where God resides to be worshipped. Infrastructure and Details There are several schools and hospitals nearby. The Vedanta Academy, for instance, lies just 1.8 km away from the area. The Porur Link Road is also the main connectivity lifeline in the area. The National Highway 48 is another major connectivity option for residents of the locality, ensuring seamless access to several nearby destinations. The Apollo Speciality Hospital is also located just 2 km away from the area. Property in Vanagaram You will find several property options in the area. These include 1, 2 and 3 BHK apartment units which are spacious and come with several amenities. They are offered by leading Real Estate developers as well in the area. The prices are somewhat higher owing to the coveted nature of the area.

Locality Guide
for Chengalpattu, Chennai

Locality Overview Video

17 More
Chengalpattu (Chengalpet or Chengalpattu) is a South-Western suburb of Chennai that is witnessing rapid developments in terms of residential and commercial constructions. The State Highway 58 that runs across the locality effectively links the place with Sadras, Thirukazhukundram, Kanchipuram, Arakkonam and Thiruthani. The major Railway Station of the place is the Chengalpattu Junction that efficiently links the place with adjoining areas. Many trains run from Kanchipuram via Chingleput to Beach Station thus connecting the locales aptly. Several state-run buses also help in aiding the local transport avenues of Chengalpet. The Chennai International Airport is located at a short driving distance from Chengalpattu. The Kolavai Lake in the vicinity lends the much needed aesthetic value to the locality. The Tamil Nadu Tourism Development Corporation (TTDC) has established a boathouse by the lake that serves as a recreational facility for the inhabitants of the area. Mahindra World City situated in close proximity to Chengalpet, houses several commercial hubs like Infosys, CapGemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro etc that has prompted many working professionals to settle in and around the area. The Mahindra World City is well connected via the Paranur Railway Station. Chengalpattu also sports various reputed schools and colleges that help in upgrading the life of the inhabitants.

59 More
Sholinganallur is a locality in the southern part of Chennai. This locality has seen a boom in population and real estate over the last few years due to a growth a thriving IT industry in the area. Most major IT companies of Tamil Nadu have their offices in Sholinganallur. The Elcot SEZ is located in Sholinganallur and is a massive employment generator. Sholinganallur is located along the OMR, one of the most important roadways of Tamil Nadu. This locality is also in close proximity to the Chennai International Airport. Many schools, restaurnats, and hospitals have opened up in this locality to cater to the population shifting there. This locaity is also home to the Prathyangira Devi Temple which is well renowned in south India. The name of the locality Sholinganallur can actually be translated to marshland. This region used to be a marshy area that has now given way to a modern IT hub. But there are still parts of the Sholinganallur marshes that have been retained and tourists come here for bir-watching and to enjoy the beauty of the area. There are also a number of lakes and water bodies scattered all over this locality that add a touch of fresh air to this urban area.

Locality Guide
for Madambakkam, Chennai
Share
+
29 More
Located in the Tambaram Corporation, Madambakkam is a residential neighborhood in Chennai, India. It shares boundaries with Sithalapakkam in the east, Vengaivasal in the north, Sembakkam in the north, and Selaiyur in the west. The town is renowned for its lush landscaping and the ancient Dhenupureeswarar temple. The coordinates for Madambakkam are 12.903848°N 80.15861°E. It is 29 meters above sea level on average (95 feet). The ancient Lord Shiva Temple in Madambakkam is well known. Lord Dhenupureeswarar is the temple's principal deity. The temple is thought to have undergone renovations when Kulothunga Chola was in power. According to legend, the temple was constructed between 956 and 973 CE, during the Parantaka Chola II (Sundara Chola) era. It features sculptures and various Shiva poses. In accordance with the G.O. of 13 January 2022, Madambakkam is a part of Tambaram Municipal Corporation. Tambaram Corporation will include two municipalities, four town panchayats in Perungalathur, Peerkankaranai, Madambakkam, and Chitlapakkam, as well as seven village panchayats. The Madambakkam, which contains military, navy, and airforce colonies, is mostly a residential region.

9 More
Ayappakkam, also known as Tamil Nadu’s biggest housing board, is situated in the Thiruvallur district in the western part of Chennai. It is predominantly a residential as well as a commercial zone in the western part of Chennai. Numerous township and residential projects are set up in and around Ayappakkam Rajus Citadel, Vin Mercury, TTM Heritage, Vin Platinum, Rangas Gomathi, etc. Poonamalle High Road connects Ayappakkam to the rest of the localities of Chennai with ease, like Anna Nagar, Mogapair, Maduravoyal, etc. Chennai Mofussil Terminus, which is 12.2 km from the locality, provides great local transportation. Thirumullaivoyal railway station is just 6 km from the locality and has great train frequency, and offers great economic transportation services. The Chennai International Airport is 21.2 km away from Ayappakkam. There is a great number of schools, high schools, colleges, and universities situated in and around the locality, which aid in offering top-class education to the residents of Ayappakkam. Many industries surround the area of Ayappakkam, some of which are: the Ambattur Industrial Estate, the biggest small-scale industrial estate in the whole of South Asia. Some other offices are Price Info Park, DLF IT Park, Ambit IT Park, and India Land IT Park.

Locality Guide
for Chengalpattu, Chennai
Share
Locality Overview Video

17 More
Chengalpattu (Chengalpet or Chengalpattu) is a South-Western suburb of Chennai that is witnessing rapid developments in terms of residential and commercial constructions. The State Highway 58 that runs across the locality effectively links the place with Sadras, Thirukazhukundram, Kanchipuram, Arakkonam and Thiruthani. The major Railway Station of the place is the Chengalpattu Junction that efficiently links the place with adjoining areas. Many trains run from Kanchipuram via Chingleput to Beach Station thus connecting the locales aptly. Several state-run buses also help in aiding the local transport avenues of Chengalpet. The Chennai International Airport is located at a short driving distance from Chengalpattu. The Kolavai Lake in the vicinity lends the much needed aesthetic value to the locality. The Tamil Nadu Tourism Development Corporation (TTDC) has established a boathouse by the lake that serves as a recreational facility for the inhabitants of the area. Mahindra World City situated in close proximity to Chengalpet, houses several commercial hubs like Infosys, CapGemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro etc that has prompted many working professionals to settle in and around the area. The Mahindra World City is well connected via the Paranur Railway Station. Chengalpattu also sports various reputed schools and colleges that help in upgrading the life of the inhabitants.

Poonamallee is a district in the western fringes of Chennai which falls under the Thiruvallur district. Poonamallee is the gateway to Chennai from the West and is also a major residential locality in the city. Poonamallee is close to the NH48 and Chennai Outer Ring Road. The locality enjoys excellent connectivity with the downtown Chennai as well as Tiruvallur. Poonamallee is an important point of halt for buses and taxis on the way to Kanchipuram, Tirupati and Vellore. The Chennai International Airport lies 21 km. away and can be accessed via the Chennai Outer Ring Road. The Chennai Railway Junction lies 24 km. away. Regular Chennai MTC Buses ferry passengers to different parts within the city from Poonamallee. Some popular localities near Poonamallee are Avadi, Balaji Magat, Manapakkam, Mangadu, Ambattur, Tambaram, Kamachi Nagar, Kattupakkam, Porur, Maduravoyal, Parivakkam, Karayanchavadi, Iyyappanthangal and Thiruverkadu. The locality has many residential projects like Godrej Palm Grove, Fortune Lotus, Casagrand Westend and TATA Santorini. Poonamallee is a promising locality for residential real estate due to its proximity to the IT Corridor of Anna Nagar and Porur.

Selaiyur is a residential locality in south Chennai, the capital city of Tamil Nadu. It is in Chennai district, located in Tambaram on Velachery Road. The locality is surrounded by places like Rajakilpakkam, over 3.92 Km, Sembakkam, over 4.39 km, and others like Medavakkam and Chitlapakkam. Selaiyur covers a total of 9.86 square kilometers. The total population is 97048 with coordinates of 12.9068° N and 80.1425° E and has a relatively hot and humid climate. The official language spoken here is Tamil. Infrastructure and Details in Selaiyur Selaiyur is connected to pharmacy options, office areas, grocery shops, restaurants, banks, hospitals, and schools. The famous temples in the area are Sri Amirthavalli Temple, Chennai Om Sri Skandasramam, and Shri Mappillai Vinayagar Temple are the famous ones. In addition, the East Tambaram Convent Bus Stop, Mjl Swimming Pool Bus Stop, Meppedu Bus Stop, and Kamarajapuram Bus Stop are near this locality. Among the famous parks there is Gandhi Park near Tambaram East, ALS Nagar Park towards Yeswanth Nagar, Madambakkam, Malleswari Nagar Park towards Yeswanth Nagar, Madambakkam, and others. Reputed schools in the area are The Little Steps, Venkateswara Vidyalaya, Pleasant Valley Middle School, Kendriya Vidyalaya No 2, and St Mark's Matriculation School. Some leading hospitals are Annai Theresa Hospital, Shree Balaji Hospitals, Diabetes & HTN Speciality Clinic, COSH Hospital, and others. The employment hubs include Air Squadion National Cadet Corps, Namita, Sathiya Studio, Sunmars Enterprises, and others. Property in Selaiyur Selaiyur offers a wide range of apartment options in various configurations such as 2BHK, 3BHK, and others. You can find the best one that suits your needs, budget, and area specification. Besides, plots or lands are available to spread over 850 sq ft. In Selaiyur, the 2 BHK apartments spread over 478 sq ft carpet area ranges rupees 46 lakhs, whereas 3 BHK over 1550 sq ft area costs rupees 1.18 crores. Some other housing projects of 2BHK and 3 BHK flats are available from 56.07 lakhs to 80.22 lakhs.

Locality Guide
for Vandalur, Chennai
Share
Vandalur is said to be the residential locality of Chennai which lies in the Chengalpattu District of Tamil Nadu State. Vandalur can also be called the census town. This place is well known because the Arignar Anna Zoological Park is located here. The total population of Vandalur is 26,311 with the coordinates of 12.89°N and 80.08°E. Vandalur is said to have dry summers and muddy rainy seasons. The entire place covers an area of 2.4 km². The local language spoken here in Vandalur is Tamil. Infrastructure and Details Vandalur is served by the CMDA (Chennai Metropolitan Area). The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport, 11.26 km and the nearest Railway Station is Vandalur, 0.4 km. The well-known places here include the Arignar Anna Zoological Park or the Vandalur Zoo, Marina Beach, MGR Memorial, Semmozhi Poonga, Thiruvanmiyur Beach, Besant Nagar Beach, Arulmigu Sri Parthasarathy Swamy Temple, Anjaneyar Temple, etc. The fastest way to reach Vandalur is to take a train to the Vandalur railway station. Some malls here at Vandalur are Gold Souk Grande, Bajrang Shopping Centre, City Mall, Jessie Enterprises, Abirami Plaza, etc. Some well-known hospitals at Vandalur are OneHealth Hospital, Acupuncture clinic, Arogya Annai Hospital, Thalir Hospital, Deepam Hospitals, Annai Arul Hospital, etc. Some well-reputed educational institutions here are Crescent College, B.S Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology, Crescent School, Shalom Matriculation Higher Secondary School, Crescent School of Business, Crescent Automobile Engineering, Institute of Social Education, etc. Some well-known employment agencies here are VelSource Staffing Solutions, Good Five Job Consultancy, Ramsol Private limited, TBS, LIC Premium and Agents Recruitment Center, Overseas Employment Services, Sathya Sai Manpower Agency, etc. Property in Vandalur Properties on offer in Vandalur are in the configuration of 2BHK & 3BHK independent houses ranging in size from 650 sq. ft. to 900 sq. ft. and 1200 sq. ft and above, respectively. Housing schemes like zero brokerage and PMAY are available too.

Locality Guide
for Anakaputhur, Chennai
Share
Anakaputhur, a suburban locality of the Chennai Metropolitan Area, is situated adjacent to the Chennai Bypass Road in the southwestern part of Chennai. Anakaputhur has become one of the most coveted areas in Chennai. Nearby localities are Eswaran Nagar, Lic Colony, Lakshmi Narayana Nagar, Moovendar Colony, Vinayagar Nagar, Lakshmi Nagar Pozhichalur, Pammal, Thendral Nagar Kamarajapuram, and Shankar Nagar Pammal. Chennai, Ambattur, Nandivaram-Guduvancheri, and Thirunindravur are the nearby cities. The area is under the jurisdiction of the Pallavaram Assembly Constituency and the Sriperumbudur Parliamentary Constituency. The latitude and longitude of Anakaputhur are 12.9802°N and 80.1265°E, respectively. With an area of 3.84 sq km, Anakaputhur has a population of 14436, including 7258 males and 7178 females, with a population density of 10014 people per sq km (according to the records of 2020). Tamil and English are the most popular local languages. The pin code is 600070. Anakaputhur has a tropical type of climate. Over the year, the temperature generally varies from 18.3ºC to 39.4°C. The warmest and the coldest month are May and December, respectively. November gets the highest relative humidity, and June gets the lowest relative humidity.

for Chengalpattu, Chennai

17 More
Chengalpattu (Chengalpet or Chengalpattu) is a South-Western suburb of Chennai that is witnessing rapid developments in terms of residential and commercial constructions. The State Highway 58 that runs across the locality effectively links the place with Sadras, Thirukazhukundram, Kanchipuram, Arakkonam and Thiruthani. The major Railway Station of the place is the Chengalpattu Junction that efficiently links the place with adjoining areas. Many trains run from Kanchipuram via Chingleput to Beach Station thus connecting the locales aptly. Several state-run buses also help in aiding the local transport avenues of Chengalpet. The Chennai International Airport is located at a short driving distance from Chengalpattu. The Kolavai Lake in the vicinity lends the much needed aesthetic value to the locality. The Tamil Nadu Tourism Development Corporation (TTDC) has established a boathouse by the lake that serves as a recreational facility for the inhabitants of the area. Mahindra World City situated in close proximity to Chengalpet, houses several commercial hubs like Infosys, CapGemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro etc that has prompted many working professionals to settle in and around the area. The Mahindra World City is well connected via the Paranur Railway Station. Chengalpattu also sports various reputed schools and colleges that help in upgrading the life of the inhabitants.

Chengalpattu (Chengalpet or Chengalpattu) is a South-Western suburb of Chennai that is witnessing rapid developments in terms of residential and commercial constructions. The State Highway 58 that runs across the locality effectively links the place with Sadras, Thirukazhukundram, Kanchipuram, Arakkonam and Thiruthani. The major Railway Station of the place is the Chengalpattu Junction that efficiently links the place with adjoining areas. Many trains run from Kanchipuram via Chingleput to Beach Station thus connecting the locales aptly. Several state-run buses also help in aiding the local transport avenues of Chengalpet. The Chennai International Airport is located at a short driving distance from Chengalpattu. The Kolavai Lake in the vicinity lends the much needed aesthetic value to the locality. The Tamil Nadu Tourism Development Corporation (TTDC) has established a boathouse by the lake that serves as a recreational facility for the inhabitants of the area. Mahindra World City situated in close proximity to Chengalpet, houses several commercial hubs like Infosys, CapGemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro etc that has prompted many working professionals to settle in and around the area. The Mahindra World City is well connected via the Paranur Railway Station. Chengalpattu also sports various reputed schools and colleges that help in upgrading the life of the inhabitants.

Siruseri is a place under the Thiruporur Panchayat union in the Chengalpattu district of Tamil Nadu. It is part of the southern suburb of Chennai. It has a population of 39610 and occupies an area of about 9.56 square kilometres. It is located between Kelambakkam and Navalur at Latitude: N 13° 3.6253'. Longitude: E 80° 14.975'. The climate in Siruseri is tropical type; wet and dry. The weather remains hot and humid for most of the year. The official language being Tamil, English is also understood and spoken here. Infrastructure and Details Nearby places are Navalur (4.71 Km), Pudupakkam (5.61 Km), Semmenchery (5.7 Km), Semmancheri (6.14 Km) and Thalambur (7.13 Km). Sonnallur R.F., Moolacheri, Karanai, Sonallur, Chennai, Natham, Pariyapillari and Gnanammal Nagar are the cities nearby Siruseri. CMI Library and Dr Ambedkar Government Law College are places of interest here. The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (13.87 km). The nearest Railway Station is Tambaram (10.85 km) Some of the renowned offices here in Siruseri are Cactus, Smartworks Kochar Globe, Chennai Radha Engineering Works (P) Ltd (CREW), TCS Siruseri, TCS Siruseri EB6, TCS Siruseri - EB1, Intellect Design Arena Ltd., SIPCOT IT Park, Siruseri Primary health centre, Siruseri Urachi Mandra office, Siruseri IT Park Administrative Office and Amtex Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd. The educational institutions nearby are MSAJAA Architecture College in Chennai, Dr Ambedkar Govt Law College, Pudupakkam, SIRUSERI, ITM Business School / ITM Skills Academy Tamilnadu India, ITM Business School, Chennai Tamil Nadu India, Mohamed Sathak Hospital and Medical College, Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering, St. John's Public School, OMR, Mohamed Sathak A J College of Nursing and Vels University School of Maritime Studies Property in Siruseri The properties here are a mix of 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK & 4BHK Flats as well as 2BHK, 3BHK & 4BHK Villas. The 2BHK independent houses measure 1050 sq. ft. There are a few Residential Plots measuring 1250 sq. ft. on offer. There are Zero Brokerage projects.

for Vengaivasal, Chennai

Vengaivasal is located in Medavakkam in Chennai in the State of Tamil Nadu. The coordinates are 12.9031° N, 80.1890° E. The area lies in the Southern part of Chennai and falls within the Greater Chennai Corporation. The area is home to major roads like the GST (Grand Southern Trunk) Road and lies near Taramani as well. The area is located near Medavakkam, Perumbakkam and Sholinganallur. The Mambakkam-Medavakkam Main Road passes through the area and links to the ECR (East Coast Road) and Old Mahabalipuram Road (OMR). Infrastructure and Details Residents can readily access the OMR, GST and ECR which are major thoroughfares in this zone. There is the Chennai International Airport Metro Station just 13 km away from the locality through the Medavakkam Main Road. The Tambaram Sanatorium Railway Station is only 10 km away while the Chennai International Airport lies approximately 13 km away from the area. The 200 and 300 Feet Radial Roads are also accessible from the area. The Madras Export Processing Zone is 13 km away from the area while the Futura Tech Park lies 6 km away from it. The Medavakkam Medical Mission Hospital is just 750 m away while the Zigma Matriculation Higher Secondary School lies 300 metres away from the locality. The Garden Café is 700 metres away and there are many other restaurants and eateries nearby. Property in Vengaivasal There are several options for independent homes in the locality. You will find 2, 3, 4, 6 and even 7 BHK home configurations here. You can get sizes up to 5,500 sq ft in several cases as well.

Kelambakkam is a fast developing residential locality coming up in the southern suburbs of Channai and lies along the coast. The old Mahabalipuram road passes thorugh the locality and the arterial Kelambakkam Vandalur road also begins from Kelambakkam. The east coast road also passes by along the Kovalam stretch and there are many beaches and tourist resorts in this area. Good residential areas neighbouring Keleambakkam include Padur, Pudapakkam, Kazhipattur, Siruseri, Egattur and Navalur. There are also IT hubs and tech parks in the vicinity. This factor alone drives the need for housing in the area. There is a mix of all types of property available in Kelambakkam and these include residential plots, villas, individual homes and apartments. 46% of all the property available for sale or rent in Kelambakkam are apartments and they are 1,2 and 4 BHK apartments. The intenrational airport and the Chennai Central railway station are both 35 to 36 kms away from Kelambakkam. There are 14 new residential projects coming uo in Kelambakkam and 4 of them are still under construction. The quality of ocnstruction is very good and this has served to increase both the viability of the area as well as to improve the overall infeastructure in the area around Kelambakkam. There are schools, hospitals, markets and malls in the area which serve the requirement of the residents.
Read More

Locality Guide
for Chengalpattu, Chennai
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
17 More
Chengalpattu (Chengalpet or Chengalpattu) is a South-Western suburb of Chennai that is witnessing rapid developments in terms of residential and commercial constructions. The State Highway 58 that runs across the locality effectively links the place with Sadras, Thirukazhukundram, Kanchipuram, Arakkonam and Thiruthani. The major Railway Station of the place is the Chengalpattu Junction that efficiently links the place with adjoining areas. Many trains run from Kanchipuram via Chingleput to Beach Station thus connecting the locales aptly. Several state-run buses also help in aiding the local transport avenues of Chengalpet. The Chennai International Airport is located at a short driving distance from Chengalpattu. The Kolavai Lake in the vicinity lends the much needed aesthetic value to the locality. The Tamil Nadu Tourism Development Corporation (TTDC) has established a boathouse by the lake that serves as a recreational facility for the inhabitants of the area. Mahindra World City situated in close proximity to Chengalpet, houses several commercial hubs like Infosys, CapGemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro etc that has prompted many working professionals to settle in and around the area. The Mahindra World City is well connected via the Paranur Railway Station. Chengalpattu also sports various reputed schools and colleges that help in upgrading the life of the inhabitants.

Locality Overview Video

17 More
Chengalpattu (Chengalpet or Chengalpattu) is a South-Western suburb of Chennai that is witnessing rapid developments in terms of residential and commercial constructions. The State Highway 58 that runs across the locality effectively links the place with Sadras, Thirukazhukundram, Kanchipuram, Arakkonam and Thiruthani. The major Railway Station of the place is the Chengalpattu Junction that efficiently links the place with adjoining areas. Many trains run from Kanchipuram via Chingleput to Beach Station thus connecting the locales aptly. Several state-run buses also help in aiding the local transport avenues of Chengalpet. The Chennai International Airport is located at a short driving distance from Chengalpattu. The Kolavai Lake in the vicinity lends the much needed aesthetic value to the locality. The Tamil Nadu Tourism Development Corporation (TTDC) has established a boathouse by the lake that serves as a recreational facility for the inhabitants of the area. Mahindra World City situated in close proximity to Chengalpet, houses several commercial hubs like Infosys, CapGemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro etc that has prompted many working professionals to settle in and around the area. The Mahindra World City is well connected via the Paranur Railway Station. Chengalpattu also sports various reputed schools and colleges that help in upgrading the life of the inhabitants.

Poonamallee is a district in the western fringes of Chennai which falls under the Thiruvallur district. Poonamallee is the gateway to Chennai from the West and is also a major residential locality in the city. Poonamallee is close to the NH48 and Chennai Outer Ring Road. The locality enjoys excellent connectivity with the downtown Chennai as well as Tiruvallur. Poonamallee is an important point of halt for buses and taxis on the way to Kanchipuram, Tirupati and Vellore. The Chennai International Airport lies 21 km. away and can be accessed via the Chennai Outer Ring Road. The Chennai Railway Junction lies 24 km. away. Regular Chennai MTC Buses ferry passengers to different parts within the city from Poonamallee. Some popular localities near Poonamallee are Avadi, Balaji Magat, Manapakkam, Mangadu, Ambattur, Tambaram, Kamachi Nagar, Kattupakkam, Porur, Maduravoyal, Parivakkam, Karayanchavadi, Iyyappanthangal and Thiruverkadu. The locality has many residential projects like Godrej Palm Grove, Fortune Lotus, Casagrand Westend and TATA Santorini. Poonamallee is a promising locality for residential real estate due to its proximity to the IT Corridor of Anna Nagar and Porur.

99 More
Medavakkam locality is situated in the southern part of Chennai. Medavakkam falls in the Changalpattu district of Tamil Nadu. In recent years Medavakkam has emerged as a major residential area of Tamil Nadu because of its close proximity to the IT sector industries along OMR. A special economic zone is also coming up along the Medavakkam Sholinganallur road and bringing many new people to the area. Medavakkam has many quaint residential neighbourhoods with greeny and open spaces. But all modern amenities of daily life like good schools, reputed hsopitals, shopping complexes and markets are all located close by. Medavakkam is also near to the Chennai International Airport making it a perfect spot for young professionals setlling down in Chennai. Medavakkam is also located in close proximity to the Tambaram and Velachery railway stations providing the area with air and rail connectivity.Medavakkam has been included under the perview of the Chennai Municipal Corporation, so more infrastuctural developments can be expected in this locality in the coming years. Some of the important and populous localitites surrounding Medavakkam are Velachery, Tambaram, Madipakkam, Sholinganallur, Keelkattalai.

30 More
Kelambakkam is a fast developing residential locality coming up in the southern suburbs of Channai and lies along the coast. The old Mahabalipuram road passes thorugh the locality and the arterial Kelambakkam Vandalur road also begins from Kelambakkam. The east coast road also passes by along the Kovalam stretch and there are many beaches and tourist resorts in this area. Good residential areas neighbouring Keleambakkam include Padur, Pudapakkam, Kazhipattur, Siruseri, Egattur and Navalur. There are also IT hubs and tech parks in the vicinity. This factor alone drives the need for housing in the area. There is a mix of all types of property available in Kelambakkam and these include residential plots, villas, individual homes and apartments. 46% of all the property available for sale or rent in Kelambakkam are apartments and they are 1,2 and 4 BHK apartments. The intenrational airport and the Chennai Central railway station are both 35 to 36 kms away from Kelambakkam. There are 14 new residential projects coming uo in Kelambakkam and 4 of them are still under construction. The quality of ocnstruction is very good and this has served to increase both the viability of the area as well as to improve the overall infeastructure in the area around Kelambakkam. There are schools, hospitals, markets and malls in the area which serve the requirement of the residents.

Palavakkam is a fast developing area in the Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu, which enjoys location advantage in terms of its proximity to the major IT Hub of Sholinganallur and to the Chennai International Airport. Located on the East Coast Road, this area enjoys good connectivity with the rest of the city. Many beaches in and around this area are the highlights of Palavakkam. This locality has seen unprecedented development over the past few years and is now equipped with every kind of luxurious modern-day facilities. Palavakkam is also well connected with other parts of the state by the nearby Taramani Railway Station. This town has witnessed all-round development in terms of facilities and infrastructure, yet it is detached from the pollution and noise of the city of Chennai..

Perungalathur is a residential area in the southern fringes of Chennai and strategically lies at the junction of 4 important by pass roads and highways. The area has lakes and parks and has greenery with open spaces. This environment makes for healthy living and Perungalathur is a good location for building a home. 96% of all the property available in Perungalathur are 1, 2 and 3 bedroom apartments including builder floors. The Chennai International airport is close by 13 kms but the Chennai central station is 36 kms away by easily accessible by road. There are several business, industrial and business parks close by and this facility not only provides employment but also drives the need for housing. There are presently 5 new residential projects underway in Perungslsthur and 1 of them is still under construction. Leading builders such as Shriram Properties, TVS emerald Casagrand as well as L& T Housing Finance are providing housing in the mid income range.

for Gerugambakkam, Chennai

Gerugambakkam is one of the popular cities in the metropolitan city of Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. The city is growing in terms of residential and industrial neighborhoods. The city will soon get a new metro station nearby- Porur metro station which shall ease the traveling and accessibility for the residents. This proposed metro station would be just 3 km away from the city. In terms of the public transport system, MTC operates a wide network of buses plying to and fro the city. Similarly, the city shares a great network of roads and railway lines. Trisulam railway station is the nearest railway station to the city, located at a distance of around 3.20 km. Similarly, the nearest airport is the Chennai International Airport, located at a distance of around 3 km away and well accessible via roadways and railways. The total population of the city, as per the recent census, is 11,551, of which the total male population is 5,949, and the total female population is 5,602. The total population density of the city is 4,931 per sq. km. and the total area is 4.13 sq. km.
